calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom for and with Robert Gainer by zoom.
Amber Gainer (Beneficiary) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it does not approve of Mr. Gainer making distributions to the beneficiaries without a court order. Mr. Gainer spoke of medical issues as well as financial issues his family has been dealing with. Ms. Gainer stated that she is not here to object. The Second Amended First and Final Account, etc. is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. The Court informed the parties that it will not approve the accounting, but it will allow it.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-19-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Continued To Oct-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Executor.

Mr. Vann stated that the estate is now ready to be closed, that they had been waiting on distribution from the trust, that they received it on Monday and that he needs a two-week continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to October 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Continued To Sep-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann, Esq., counsel for Robert Gainer, personal representative.

At the Court's query, Mr. Vann reports on the status of estate administration advising the Court that the closing of the estate has been delayed due to a dispute in a related trust. The trust dispute has been resolved in mediation and Mr. Vann is awaiting the sale of the trust property and a distribution from the trust. As a complicating factor, Mr. Vann has been advised that the Trustee has fired the attorney representing the trust.

After further discussion, the Court continues the matter to September 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Continued To Nov-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on November 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he/she failed to appear and why the Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. The Probate Accounting Status Petition is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Continued To Oct-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Robert Gainer.
Karen Gainer Lawrence (Beneficiary of the Cassie Gainer Trust) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Vann stated that there is nothing to inventory, that his Client's three Children inherit the Aunts share in the trust, that the trust matter is in litigation and that they have agreed to mediate the trust matter. Mr. Vann also stated that there is still one piece of real property and some cash. The Court informed Mr. Vann that an interest in a trust can be appraised. Ms. Lawrence stated that she is disputing the legitimacy of her Sister's will and that the will is not in her Sister's handwriting. The Court informed Ms. Lawrence that she will need to file something and suggested that she get an Attorney. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to October 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects to see an inventory and appraisal by a Probate Referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on May 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
